creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169736
Unified diff

Removed many obsolete files and improved organization.

Greatly improved support for Lumina desktop.

Support for 64-bit Linux compatibility (still defaults to 32-bit).

Minor bug fixes and enhancements.
    
portlint: OK (Looks fine)
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3, 10.1, i386, amd64)
